description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a short, smooth, golden-tan coat and a well-proportioned, athletic build. The body is lean and muscular, with a straight back and a gently sloping tail that hangs down naturally. The head is broad with a gentle stop, and the muzzle is of medium length, blending smoothly into the skull. The ears are floppy and hang close to the sides of the head, giving the dog a gentle and approachable expression. The legs are straight and sturdy, with well-defined paws, and the overall stance suggests alertness and readiness for movement. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog appears healthy and well-groomed.
description: A medium-sized, golden-tan dog with a short, smooth coat, floppy ears, and a straight, down-hanging tail. The build is athletic and the expression is gentle and approachable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's lean, muscular body, floppy ears, and straight tail hanging down.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dog's back, hind legs, and the tail hanging straight down.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same athletic build, smooth coat, and gentle facial features.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the broad head, floppy ears, and straight front legs.
attribute_breed: Labrador Retriever (yellow variant) or similar mixed breed with dominant Labrador features
